top_signals.title: Panetta Sees Fragile Outlook With Risks to Inflation and Growth
top_signals.summary: The European Central Bank is navigating an uncertain economic situation even as the US and Iran move closer to a lasting peace deal, according to Governing Council member Fabio Panetta.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Czech June Inflation Slows More Than Expected After Rate Hike
top_signals.summary: Czech inflation slowed more than expected below target last month, underscoring the central bank’s monetary-policy dilemma after it raised interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: A Catholic Security Scholar’s Case for Responsible Military AI
top_signals.summary:
What do you do when two identities that make up your deepest self find themselves on opposite sides of a moral and spiritual battlefield?I am Catholic. I have been one for over 20 years since I made the life-altering decision to join a friend for Mass one day. My faith became a spiritual and ethical foundation at a time I sorely needed it, so much so that for a time, I contemplated entering the priesthood, which replaced my previous career goal of entering the CIA. I eventually realized that teaching was my true calling and decided to pursue that path

The post A Catholic Security Scholar’s Case for Responsible Military AI appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Missile test marks new phase in expansion of China’s nuclear-armed submarine force
top_signals.summary: Monday's launch was the first known full-range — or near-full-range — flight test of a Chinese long-range submarine-launched ballistic missile.

top_signals.title: Hanwha Ocean shares sink 23% as it loses bid to build Canada's next fleet of submarines
top_signals.summary: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney announced Monday that Germany's Thyssenkrupp Marine Systems would be the preferred supplier for delivering the submarines.

top_signals.title: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs, as Xbox unit downsizes and plans to spin off four gaming studios
top_signals.summary: Microsoft is cutting jobs in its commercial business and its Xbox gaming group, where revenue has been shrinking.

top_signals.title: Controversial bills threaten to push parliament session into overtime
top_signals.summary: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi is caught between honoring a promise to the Japan Innovation Party and the reality that it will be difficult to pass the bills in the Upper House.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Paradigm leads $5.5 million seed round in M1X Global to expand tokenized sovereign debt platform
top_signals.summary: M1X Global, which worked with the Republic of the Marshall Islands on the issuance of the onchain sovereign bond USDM1, has raised funds.
